classes.reasoning: The document explicitly states 'Edition 3' in the header and footer, contains document history listing 'Edition 1 05 Sep 2023 Initial IB', provides comprehensive safety, efficacy, pharmacokinetic, and benefit-risk assessment data characteristic of an Investigator Brochure. Section 1 describes updates to 'clinical safety and efficacy sections' following Phase III interim data.

intervention: BRC-883, 150 mg SC q4w (standard dose), 100 mg SC q4w (renal impairment), 75 mg SC q4w (paediatric pilot)
indication: Lipid-lowering (implied from LDL-C, ApoB, Non-HDL-C, Lp(a) efficacy endpoints and cardiovascular context)
summary: This is Edition 3 of an Investigator Brochure for an investigational lipid-lowering drug (BRC-883), updated January 2025 following Week 52 interim analysis of a Phase III study (n=412 randomized). The document summarizes pharmacokinetic data, safety signals (hepatic ALT elevation at 2.1%, renal impairment dose adjustments), efficacy outcomes (LDL-C reduction ~57%), immunogenicity, and updated hepatic monitoring guidance.
references_to: Edition 2 01 Aug 2024 Phase III safety interim, hepatic signal, paed.
Week 52 interim analysis data (data cut-off: 30 September 2024, n=412 randomised, n=389 with at least one post-baseline assessment)
